Frequently Asked Questions
1. State Bank of India SBI Probationary Officers PO Online Form Start Date?
The online application process started on 18 June 2026.
2. SBI Probationary Officers PO  Exam Date?
The Stage-I Pre Examination will be conducted in August 2026 .
3. Where can I find the syllabus for the State Bank of India SBI 2026 Probationary Officers Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme for the SBI PO Probationary Officers Examination are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete syllabus details.
4. SBI PO Probationary Officers 2026 Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
5. State Bank of India SBI Probationary Officers PO Recruitment Last Date?
The last date to apply online is 08 July 2026..
6. What is the last date to Pay application fee ?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 08 July 2026 .
7. How can I apply for State Bank of India SBI Probationary Officers 2026 Exam?
